# EV6 Battery Warranty

The EV6 battery warranty covers defects in the high-voltage battery pack,
charging control hardware, and battery-management electronics during the
published warranty period.

Warranty review should include the service history, charging records, and any
diagnostic codes reported by the dealer. A fast-charging slowdown by itself is
not enough to approve a warranty claim unless diagnostics show a qualifying
battery fault.

When a customer asks about EV6 battery coverage, support should confirm the
model year, mileage, and whether previous repairs were performed by an
authorized service center.
